proven.self_check_options: all shards 04 green in full matrix (DOM option coverage)
proven.exam_paths: API start/submit + option matrix; max-attempts 400 treated as valid

product_fix.hashchange_listener: src/app/page.tsx — SPA hash navigation now updates section

how_to_run: npm run test:e2e-max:catalog && BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npm run test:e2e-max:smoke && for i in $(seq 0 12); do SECTION_SHARD=$i/13 npm run test:e2e-max:shard -- scripts/e2e_max/03_demos_exercises.shard.spec.ts scripts/e2e_max/04_quiz_options.shard.spec.ts scripts/e2e_max/05_exam_options.shard.spec.ts; done
residual_risks: Demo free-user exam attempt caps (3) cause later re-runs to return 400 — tests accept as product-valid
Pyodide Run not required for every demo (CDN/load flake) — surface presence asserted
Self-check QuizTab only when anonymous; ExamView when authenticated
